osm_desc_en: Made from tyres and wood, only used during the winter months.

wiki_desc_en: Milk churn stand with milk churn in Gribuški, "Ķirbēni".
wiki_desc_lv: Piena galds ar piena kannu Gribuškās, pie "Ķirbēnu" mājām. Piena kanna ir sasegta ar segu, lai pasargātu pienu no aukstuma.

wiki_desc_en: Wooden milk churn stand with churns in Muktupāveli. In 2023 was still in active use.

name_en: Milk churn stand in Kalna Gudļevski
wiki_desc_en: Milk churn stand with churns in Kalna Gudļevski. Modern milk cars collect milk by pumping it from the churn straight into the tank. The intermediary - milk churn stand - is therefore no longer necessary.
